metadata.title: Pricing | Slashie
metadata.description: Customers use Slashie for free. Workers can send free quotes each month or subscribe to Slashie Unlimited. Job payments stay between customer and worker.

header.heading: Simple plans. Clear quotes.
header.body: Customers post for free. Workers start free, then upgrade when they want unlimited quotes.

error.heading: Pricing unavailable
error.body: We could not load plan details right now. Refresh the page or try again in a few minutes.
error.paymentNote: Job payments are always arranged directly between customers and workers outside Slashie.

trialBanner.defaultBody: Try Slashie Unlimited free. Cancel anytime.

free.title: Worker Free
free.subtitle: Start finding tasks
features: Send up to {count} quotes per month
Show your worker profile and reviews
Keep the same worker profile and reputation

items.question: What am I paying for?
items.answer: Slashie Unlimited is a subscription for workers who want unlimited quotes. It is not a fee for completing tasks or receiving job payment.

items.question: Do customers pay Slashie?
items.answer: No. Customers post tasks, compare quotes, and accept a worker for free in the current MVP.

items.question: How do workers get paid?
items.answer: The customer and worker arrange payment directly outside Slashie. Slashie does not hold, process, or release job money.

items.question: What happens after the trial?
items.answer: After your trial ends, Slashie Unlimited continues at {price} per month unless you cancel before the trial period ends.

items.question: Can I cancel?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel from your worker plan page when billing management is available. Canceling stops future subscription charges.

disclaimer.body: Job payments are arranged directly between customers and workers. Slashie subscription is for platform access only.

metadata.title: 收費方案 | Slashie
metadata.description: 客戶免費使用 Slashie。工作者每月可發送免費報價，或訂閱 Slashie Unlimited。任務付款由客戶和工作者直接安排。

header.heading: 簡單方案，清楚報價。
header.body: 客戶免費發布任務。工作者先免費開始，需要無限報價時再升級。

error.heading: 暫時無法載入收費
error.body: 目前無法載入方案詳情。請重新整理頁面，或稍後再試。
error.paymentNote: 任務付款一律由客戶和工作者在 Slashie 之外直接安排。

trialBanner.defaultBody: 免費試用 Slashie Unlimited，可隨時取消。
trialBanner.bodyWithTrial: 免費試用 Slashie Unlimited {trial}，可隨時取消。

free.title: 工作者免費方案
free.subtitle: 開始尋找任務
features: 每月最多發送 {count} 個報價
展示工作者檔案和評價
在 Slashie 協調任務細節
管理帳單並可隨時取消
沿用同一工作者檔案和口碑

items.question: 我付費買的是什麼？
items.answer: Slashie Unlimited 是給需要無限報價的工作者使用的訂閱方案。這不是完成任務或收取任務款項的費用。

items.question: 客戶需要付費給 Slashie 嗎？
items.answer: 不需要。在目前 MVP 中，客戶可以免費發布任務、比較報價並接受工作者。

items.question: 工作者如何收取任務款項？
items.answer: 客戶和工作者在 Slashie 之外直接安排付款。Slashie 不保管、處理或發放任務款項。

items.question: 試用結束後會怎樣？
items.answer: 試用期結束後，Slashie Unlimited 會以每月 {price} 繼續訂閱；如不想續用，請在試用期結束前取消。

items.question: 可以取消嗎？
items.answer: 可以。帳單管理可用後，你可在工作者方案頁取消。取消後不會再產生之後的訂閱費。

disclaimer.body: 任務付款由客戶和工作者直接安排。Slashie 訂閱只用於平台使用權。
